chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2107 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For order on office objection No.1. 2. For hearing of CMA No.10336/2025 (stay). 3. For hearing of main case. 27-05-2025 Mr. Manzar Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent This petition was filed on the premise that a demand notice has been served on the petitioner without any adjudication. Notice was issued and today Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate has filed his power and a statement on behalf of respondent No.2 and 3 has also been filed. The statement and its annexures demonstrate that the demand was preceded by an entire adjudication process and orders-in-original have also been issued. While the respondent has placed the copy of the said instrument on record, the factum had been clearly concealed from this Court. The petition is found to be prima facie misconceived and abuse of process of Court, hence dismissed along with all pending applications. It is noted that the orders-in-original were issued on 16.01.2025 and the petition was filed on 20.05.2025. It would prima facie appear that the adjudication process was concealed from the Court in an attempt to obtain orders outside the realm of the law, therefore, issue show cause notice under Section-17 Sub-section-2 of the Contempt of Court Ordinance, 2003 to the Chief Executive and Company Secretary of the petitioner. The notice shall be served through bailiff and SHO concerned. The compliance report shall be placed on record on or before the next date of hearing. Adjourned to 03.06.2025. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
